title: Wetsuit Drysuit Shampoo Cleaner for Marine Scuba Dive Gear - 10oz
description:
Tested and proven shampoo for all neoprene and watersports gear. Perfect for wet suits, dry suits, boots and gloves, fishing waders, orthopedic supports, lycra body suits and more. Cleans organic residue, chlorine and salt deposits from neoprene gear. Chlorine-removing agents and conditioners help prevent premature aging and oxidation. Instructions from : 1) Mix 1oz (30ml) in 2 gallons of water. 2) Knead item to wash. 3) Rinse and air dry. 4) Store away from heat and sunlight. Spot Cleaning: Use full strength on heavily soiled areas. Work shampoo into item. Rinse thoroughly with fresh water. To remove stubborn odors, use Revivex Odor Eliminator after cleaning.
